assertions.assertion: Local /api/orders endpoint uses .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might not know the AsBffApiEndpoint() extension method
RequireAuthorization is standard ASP.NET Core knowledge

assertions.assertion: Calls AddRemoteApis() on the BFF builder
assertions.rationale: AddRemoteApis() is a v4-specific registration step that is not broadly documented

assertions.assertion: Uses MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint for /api/catalog pointing to https://catalog-service.internal/api
assertions.rationale: MapRemoteBffApiEndpoint is somewhat known from Duende BFF docs, though the exact syntax may vary
Without skill, an LLM might use older v3 syntax .RequireAccessToken(TokenType.User) instead of v4's .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User)
